description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a predominantly black upper with vibrant red accents and a white midsole. The shoe has a low-cut design, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a visible pull tab at the heel in red. The lacing system uses a standard criss-cross pattern with black laces that have white dotted highlights. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic mesh and fabric, with some areas showing a marbled or splattered white pattern. The outsole is thick and likely made of rubber, providing cushioning and grip, with red highlights visible along the tread. The interior is lined in red, and the overall condition of the shoe appears clean and structurally intact, suggesting it is either new or like new.
description: A black athletic shoe with red accents, white midsole, and a criss-cross lacing system, featuring a padded collar and a red pull tab. The shoe is clean, modern, and designed for comfort and performance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the black upper, red interior lining, criss-cross laces, and red pull tab at the heel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white midsole, red outsole accents, and a visible red logo on the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the marbled white pattern on the upper and the overall streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Heel view focusing on the red pull tab, heel structure, and the layered sole construction.
attribute_logo: red swoosh-like logo on the side near the heel
